75126.subject: To Infinity and Beyond
75126.body:
In Context

Автор: J.P. Morgan


Автор: J.P. Morgan

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/infinity-beyond-jpmorgan-xrb7e?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B8YSZBnQJRteJI7gL8M9PmA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=1QuUYa_f8ckck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqv8yxg9~6t-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqv8yxg9-6t
  
🚀 In light of SpaceX’s historic IPO, discover how the space economy is becoming a launchpad for growth. ⚽ Which sectors stand to outperform during the 2026 FIFA World Cup? 🔐 Discover why investing in strategic technology is critical for security and resiliency. Want more content from In Context? Sign up here to receive weekly insights directly in your inbox. What’s propelling the space economy? The space economy is transitioning from a niche sector to a launchpad for growth. Historically, much of space startup investment was directed at space access. Spacecraft manufacturing and launches alone accounted for over half of all deals globally, and the infrastructure phase was dominated by private markets and venture capital. The use-case phase, by contrast, has the potential to touch public companies across a range of established industries, making the space theme more investable for public market participants. Defense demand, commercial investment and the possibility of space-based solar power (SBSP) are bringing the third age of the space economy into focus. What’s next for the industry? Prepare for liftoff 🔗 By the numbers $250B As per the World Economic Forum, the space defense market could be worth $250 billion by 2035 as countries seek to build out orbital defense systems. $910M J.P. Morgan Global Research estimates that the World Cup could generate $910 million in incremental U.S. hotel room revenue. $18T According to data from S&P Global, private markets assets under management (AUM) is projected to exceed $18 trillion by 2027. 2026 FIFA World Cup: Could equity markets score big? The tournament is poised to generate a surge in consumption, which could result in a windfall for consumer-facing sectors such as accommodation and advertising. Get in the game 🔗 Powering the AI revolution AI is increasingly tied to physical infrastructure, from data centers to supply chains. It’s creating new pressure points, but also new opportunities — and how it scales and who it serves is still evolving. Watch more 📹 What’s driving financial sponsors to diversify? For decades, financial sponsors followed a familiar playbook: acquire companies, improve operations and exit through public markets or strategic sales. However, the landscape is shifting. Explore the factors 🔗 Want more content from In Context? 📩 Sign up here to receive weekly insights directly in your inbox.
Продовжити читати на L

75124.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 26
75124.body:
AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: CryptoBeholder.com


Автор: CryptoBeholder.com

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-26-cryptobeholder-snoff?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BRXa1XU9fTCGAvzyVY0FjTw%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2l8oZE6JSFjYk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqv4nldr~4h-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqv4nldr-4h
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Crypto is in full risk-off mode as Bitcoin slides to multi-year lows on hot inflation data and rate-hike fears — even as institutions keep building, with SBI, Circle, ICE and OKX all pushing deeper into the on-chain economy. 📉 Bitcoin Crashes Below $60K as $1B in Positions Wipe Out Bitcoin slipped beneath the $60,000 line and touched its lowest level since October 2024, dragging more than $1 billion in leveraged positions into liquidation. The selloff followed a hotter-than-expected inflation reading that pushed traders to abandon rate-cut hopes and start pricing in a possible Fed hike as soon as October. Read full story → 🤝 SBI to Buy Bitbank in $289M Deal, Forming Japan's Largest Exchange Japanese financial conglomerate SBI agreed to acquire crypto exchange Bitbank for roughly $289 million, taking full control and folding it into a subsidiary. The combined group would hold an estimated $6.2 billion in crypto under custody, making it the biggest digital-asset custody provider in Japan. More details → ⚖️ Binance to Restrict EU Services as MiCA Rules Take Effect Binance will limit onboarding and certain services for European Union users from July 1 after failing to secure authorization from a member state under the bloc's MiCA framework. Withdrawals will stay available, but the move highlights tightening regulatory pressure across Europe. Read more → 🏛️ ICE and OKX Launch Tokenized Equities Venture Exchange operator ICE and crypto platform OKX unveiled a joint venture for tokenized equities and real-world assets, signaling a deeper push by traditional market infrastructure onto blockchain rails. The tie-up reflects accelerating Wall Street interest in moving conventional assets on-chain. See details → 🛡️ Europol Freezes $47M in Crypto During Global Infostealer Takedown Europol froze about $47 million in digital assets as part of a coordinated international operation against infostealer malware networks. The action underscores both crypto's exposure to cybercrime and the growing capability of law enforcement to trace and seize illicit funds. Read full story → 🚩 CoinEx Disputes Claim It Channeled $3.8B for Sanctioned Iranian Firms Analytics firm TRM Labs alleged that exchange CoinEx facilitated more than $3.8 billion in flows tied to 60 sanctioned Iranian entities, a share of illicit activity

75044.subject: Pozvánka na vstup do aplikácie SBA educa
75044.body: Dobrý deň, Na základe úhrady FA za odbornú skúšku, Vám zasielame prístup na vzdelávanie do aplikácie SBAeduca. Vzdelávanie je zadarmo a ponúkame Vám ho ako možnosť prípravy na skúšku. Pre prvé prihlásenie do aplikácie kliknite na nasledujúci link https://www.sbaeduca.sk/Prihlasenie?iduser=130088&code=Gjizezcx Po prihlásení zadajte nové heslo. Nové heslo musí obsahovať minimálne 8 znakov, pričom aspoň jedno z nich musí byť číslo. Pri prvom prihlásení ešte pred vytvorením nového hesla budete 2x vyzvaný na súhlas so spracovaním osobných údajov. Po zadaní hesla už tento link nebude fungovať. Prihlasovanie potom prebieha cez stránku www.sbaeduca.sk. Prihlasovacie meno je Vaša emailová adresa a heslo je to, ktoré ste si zvolili pri prvom prihlásení. Ak heslo zabudnete, na našej stránke v časti prihlásenie je možnosť poslať si nový prihlasovací link. ––––––––––––- Ak ste už mali prístup do aplikácie a požiadali ste o nové heslo, tak Vaše staré heslo platí do zadania nového hesla. Ak nie je možné kliknúť na link, skopírujte ho do adresného riadku Vášho internetového prehliadača a stlačte ENTER. V prípade potreby kontaktujte: podpora@sbaeduca.sk ––––––––––––- Poznámka: Prosím neodpovedajte na tento e-mail. E-mail bol vygenerovaný automaticky.
